text: Being here, I feel an intriguing blend of silence and anticipation. The space is carefully designed, awash with artificial light and textured color that casts a surreal glow over everything. As I look in through the glass, I sense a boundary between the everyday world and a zone devoted to curiosity and creation. It is a place for research and development—a liminal area where possibility is displayed and encouraged. I feel a quiet awe, as if stepping into an arena of ideas just waiting to be realized.
